headline: Home Depot sets sights on AI with CTO appointment
summary: Franziska Bell will join the home improvement company to lead an AI-driven tech strategy that's focused on customer experience and operational efficiency.

headline: RH Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Stock Down 17%
summary: RH stock plunged 17% after Q4 misses, can revenue growth and long-term investments offset tariff, margin and demand pressures ahead?

headline: AXIL Brands Launches AXIL Hearing Protection Products at HomeDepot Online
summary: LOS ANGELES, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AXIL Brands, Inc. (NYSE American: AXIL), a leader in innovative hearing enhancement and protection technology, today announced a new agreement with Home Depot, that will feature a suite of its flagship AXIL products available for purchase on HomeDepot.com. This strategic online partnership broadens Home Depot’s ability to offer industry-leading hearing protection solutions to its customers, while expanding the use-case for AXIL’s unique and feature

headline: Jefferies Reiterates Buy on Home Depot (HD) After Mingledorff’s Deal
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the 10 Best 52-Week Low NYSE Stocks to Buy Now. On March 24, 2026, Jefferies said The Home Depot, Inc.
